name: toleranceChain
invariants: output.ok === false || !('chain' in output.result) || output.result.chain.every(c => Number.isFinite(c.nominal) && Number.isFinite(c.tolerance) && Number.isFinite(c.cumulativeNominal))
_note: Directional 1-D tolerance chain (TolerancePanel.tsx). closingDimension.nominal = directional sum of nominals; worstCaseTolerance = sum of |tol| (default 0.01); rssTolerance = sqrt(sum tol²). fitVerdict present only when targetGap is finite; interferenceRisk uses ROUNDED minGap so it doesn't flicker on float dust at minGap=0. finiteOr() coerces poisoned NaN/Infinity nominal/tolerance/direction to finite defaults. Reads from artifact.data. Pure compute, no STATE, deterministic.
